SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Decades of Flooring Excellence in Miami

E Top Flooring has been transforming spaces across Miami-Dade County for over a decade. Founded by seasoned flooring experts, we built our reputation on delivering unparalleled quality and service, even in the face of Miami's unique environmental challenges.

Our approach is simple: understand your vision, assess your needs, and execute with precision. We prioritize clear communication, meticulous preparation, and durable materials that stand up to the Florida heat, humidity, and occasional hurricane.

We're deeply invested in the Miami community, supporting local initiatives and sourcing materials whenever possible. E Top Flooring isn't just about installing floors; it's about building lasting relationships and enhancing the beauty of our city.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose E Top Flooring

Hurricane-Resistant Installs

We specialize in flooring solutions designed to withstand Miami's intense weather, from high winds to potential flooding.

Expert Material Selection

We guide you through choosing the perfect flooring for your lifestyle and budget, considering Miami's humidity and salt air.

Meticulous Preparation

Our detailed prep work ensures a flawless and long-lasting installation, addressing any subfloor imperfections.

Unwavering Commitment

From initial consultation to final inspection, we're dedicated to providing exceptional service and complete satisfaction.

Transform Your Space Today

Get a free, no-obligation quote for your flooring project. Call E Top Flooring now!

Get a Free Estimate Call +17865420199

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

E Top Flooring did an incredible job installing tile in my kitchen. The team was professional, efficient, and the final result is stunning. They paid close attention to detail and made sure everything was perfect. I highly recommend them!

Maria G. Tile Flooring Installation
“

We hired E Top Flooring to install hardwood floors in our living room. The floors look beautiful, and the installers were very skilled. There was a slight delay in getting the materials, but they communicated well and kept us informed.

David S. Hardwood Flooring Installation
“

E Top Flooring installed laminate flooring in my condo, and I couldn't be happier. The price was competitive, the installation was quick, and the floors look fantastic. They were professional and cleaned up thoroughly after the job was done.

Jessica L. Laminate Flooring Installation
“

Our hardwood floors suffered water damage after a recent storm. E Top Flooring came to the rescue and restored them to their original beauty. The team was knowledgeable, efficient, and the repairs are seamless. I highly recommend their services!

Robert K. Floor Repair & Restoration
“

We chose E Top Flooring to install vinyl flooring in our bathroom. The installation was done quickly and professionally. The floors look great and are perfect for a bathroom. The price was reasonable, and the service was excellent.

Sarah P. Vinyl Flooring Installation
“

E Top Flooring installed new flooring in our office space. The team was professional and worked efficiently to minimize disruption to our business. The new floors look great and have made a big difference in the overall look of our office.

Michael B. Commercial Flooring Solutions

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Will hardwood flooring work in Miami's humid climate?
Yes, with proper selection and installation. We use moisture-resistant hardwoods and advanced techniques to combat humidity.
How long does hardwood flooring installation take?
The duration depends on the size of the area and the complexity of the project, but we provide a detailed timeline upfront.
What type of maintenance is required for hardwood floors in Miami?
Regular cleaning with a hardwood-specific cleaner is essential. We also recommend periodic refinishing to maintain the floor's luster and protection.
